buildCommand: cd packages/astro-web && npm run build && mkdir -p ../../.vercel && cp -r .vercel/output ../../.vercel/output && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='../../.vercel/output/config.json';const c=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));c.routes=c.routes.map(r=>{if(r.src&&r.src.includes('/search')&&r.dest&&r.dest.includes('_isr')){return {...r,dest:r.dest.replace('_isr','_render')};}return r;});fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(c,null,2));"
